---
title: "OUS Data"
author: "Jason D. Everett"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
---

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(terra)
library(tidyterra)

data_path <- file.path("KosraeData")

#kosrae equal area projection from projection wizard, found using bbox of 12nm limits
kos_crs <- "+proj=cea +lon_0=163 +lat_ts=2.8 +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs"

coast <-  sf::st_read(file.path(data_path, "kos_osm_shoreline.gpkg")) %>%
  sf::st_transform(crs = kos_crs)

bndry <- sf::st_read(file.path(data_path, "contour_500.gpkg")) %>%
  sf::st_transform(crs = kos_crs)

pgrid <- spatialgridr::get_grid(boundary = bndry,
                                # resolution = 50,
                                resolution = 100,
                                crs = kos_crs,
                                touches = TRUE)


files <- c(list.files(file.path(data_path, "ocean-use-survey", "kosrae_ous_heatmaps"), pattern = ".tif$", full.names = TRUE),
           list.files(file.path(data_path, "ocean-use-survey", "subsectors"), pattern = ".tif$", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE))

for (i in 1:length(files)){
  
  r <- terra::rast(files[i]) %>%
    terra::project(kos_crs) %>%
    terra::crop(pgrid) %>% 
    log10()
  
  g <- ggplot() +
    tidyterra::geom_spatraster(data = r, aes(fill = .data[[terra::names(r)]])) +
    # tidyterra::scale_fill_grass_c() +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", guide = guide_colourbar(title = "")) +
    geom_sf(data = bndry, fill = NA) +
    geom_sf(data = coast, fill = "antiquewhite") +
    coord_sf(expand = FALSE) +
    ggtitle(paste("log10(", terra::names(r), ")"))
  
  print(g)
}
```
